name: raw2d
description: Codex tools and skills for building, documenting, and visually testing Raw2D.

interface.shortDescription: Build Raw2D features with docs and visual checks.
interface.longDescription: Raw2D plugin helps contributors scaffold examples, write feature docs, run package checks, and verify Canvas/WebGL behavior without hiding the rendering pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Add a Raw2D feature with tests and docs.
Create a Canvas and WebGL example.
Run Raw2D visual checks and summarize issues.
